knowledge.title: VPN connection failure
knowledge.fix: Confirm MFA approval, reset the VPN client profile, flush DNS, and verify remote access group membership.

knowledge.title: Password or account lockout
knowledge.fix: Unlock the account, force a password reset, check failed login source, and verify MFA methods.

knowledge.title: Printer unavailable
knowledge.fix: Restart the print spooler, verify network reachability, reinstall the queue, and check device supplies.

tickets.title: VPN failed for test
tickets.description: VPN cannot connect and shows an MFA tunnel error.
tickets.recommendation: Confirm MFA approval, reset the VPN client profile, flush DNS, and verify remote access group membership.
